title: Section 38K
content: 138K. Definitions.-- In this Chapter,-- (a) "National Tiger Conservation Authority" means the Tiger Conservation Authority constituted under section 38L; (b) "Steering Committee" means the Committee constituted under section 38U; (c) "Tiger Conservation Foundation" means the foundation established under section 38X; (d) "tiger reserve State" means a State having tiger reserve; (e) "tiger reserve" means the areas notified as such under section 38V.
